name: solarwire-editor
description: SolarWire Editor - A complete document workspace

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors green,blue --prefix "[{name}]" --names "vite,electron" "npm run vite" "npm run electron:dev"
scripts.dev:win: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors green,blue --prefix "[{name}]" --names "vite,electron" "npm run vite" "npm run electron:dev"
scripts.electron:dev: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && node src/main/wait-for-vite.js && electron --disable-gpu dist/main/index.js
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && vite build && electron-builder
